brand_dna.category: Handmade organic wool bedding and natural wool wadding, made on-farm in regional Victoria, Australia.
brand_dna.core_belief: Making a natural and luxurious product to sleep under that is also good for the planet, following the wool from farm to end use.
proof_points: Handmade in Australia using organic, natural materials (homepage)
Doonas made on-farm in Woodend, VIC, with wool followed from farm to end use (about page)
100% natural, renewable wool product; supplies small manufacturers, quilters, saddlers and artists (about page)
Ships worldwide via Australia Post; already sent to NZ, USA, Canada, Japan, Italy, Germany, France and Singapore (shipping policy)
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, low-volume, maker-led and eco-conscious - the opposite of mass-produced synthetic bedding.

voice_pillars.name: Farm-Direct Maker
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks as one person who makes the product by hand and knows exactly where the wool comes from.
voice_pillars.quote: seeing last year's wool made into this year's doonas

voice_pillars.name: Earnestly Eco
voice_pillars.desc: Frames every product around being natural, renewable and genuinely good for the planet.
voice_pillars.quote: making a natural and luxurious product to sleep under, which is also good for the planet

voice_pillars.name: Warm and Personal
voice_pillars.desc: Writes one-to-one in the first person, casual and approachable, like a note from the owner.
voice_pillars.quote: If you have any questions please contact me!

voice_pillars.name: Handmade Quality
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on craft and durability rather than hype - comfort that is built to last.

phrases: handmade in Australia using organic, natural materials
Pillows hand made from organic materials
natural and luxurious product to sleep under

icp: Eco-conscious Australian home buyers who prefer natural over synthetic, value handmade craft and provenance, and will pay a premium for wool bedding that is better for their sleep and the planet.

personas.name: Natural Home Nester
personas.description: A health- and environment-minded home buyer who wants chemical-free, natural-fibre bedding and is moved by the farm-to-end-use story.

personas.name: Maker and Crafter
personas.description: Quilters, doll makers, saddlers and artists who buy wool wadding and fillings and respond to quality, versatility and sample packs.

personas.name: Conscious Gift Giver
personas.description: Someone seeking a luxurious, planet-friendly present who is moved by handmade, Australian-made craft that lasts.

offers: Ships anywhere in the world via Australia Post; express post available for urgent orders
Local pick-up available from Woodend, VIC
Wadding and filling sample packs from $15.00 to try before committing
Contact directly for combined postage on multiple items
Newsletter with shop updates, new launches and exclusive offers (over 5,000 subscribers)

allowed.claim: Handmade in Australia using organic, natural materials.
Doonas and pillows are handmade on-farm in Woodend, VIC.
100% wool filling and 100% natural weed matting.
We post anywhere in the world, using Australia Post.
Wool is a natural, renewable resource followed from farm to end use.

banned.claim: Wool bedding boosts immunity or improves your health.
banned.why: Unsupported health / immunity claim not permitted for this category.

banned.claim: Helps treat, cure or relieve asthma, allergies, eczema or any condition.
banned.why: Disease-treatment claim is banned; brand holds no medical evidence.

banned.claim: Detoxifies or purifies your sleep environment.
banned.why: Unqualified 'detox' claims are banned for this category.
Absolute purity claim is unverified and risky without certification backing.

banned.claim: Headline use of vague 'clean' or bare 'natural' as the core proof.
banned.why: 'Natural' and 'clean' are vague, risky headline claims; qualify with specifics.

banned.claim: Organic across the full range without qualification.
banned.why: Only some items are described as organic; blanket 'organic' could mislead. Match the actual product.
